title: Last War:Survival
notes:

The [Status] feature is now available. You can set tags such as [In Combat], [Do Not Disturb], and [Taking a break] as your status via the [+] button in chat. Once set, the status will appear on [My Profile] and in private chats with other Commanders.

We’ve shuffled the deck and dealt a brand-new update to make your card-playing experience smoother, faster, and more exciting than ever. Here is what’s waiting for you in the latest version.

title: Big Fish Casino: Slots Games
notes:
IT’S SUMMER – Prepare for a refreshing new setting.
KEEP YOUR COOL – Jump straight into your first slot—no delays, no downloads.
A SPLASH OF PARADISE – A smoother, more refined experience awaits.

title: Hero Wars: Alliance RPG
notes:
Twilight falls on Dominion.

The team’s back together.
New Twilight Skins for Guus, Artemis, and Tristan — the Way of Honor stands strong.

Guus and Tristan also get a Skin+.
Dominion is under control.
title_kr: Hero Wars: Alliance 에픽 영웅 RPG

title: Zynga Poker: Texas Holdem Game
notes:
NEW: Zynga Poker Cup! It’s your season to score! Prepare to represent your country in the ultimate poker showdown. Get ready to take your shot and win big!
Buddy Bonus: We’ve upgraded gifting! Having more buddies now means bigger rewards and massive multipliers every time you spin!
Experience smoother gameplay with various bug fixes and performance improvements

title: Clash of Critters
notes:
1. New Fire Tatari Poakie + Tier 4 Evolutions: Skinklet→Hychroma and Funglet→Ecstamira.
2. Zobo Shooter reworked: increased kill chances, rewards, adjusted Bullet Coin rates, removed chests.
3. New character & avatar, chat search upgrade, Trial Quests filtering & 2-week event schedule.
4. Fixed battle bugs: Brick Zobo leaping, Goonbug dashing in place, Pyroclobster/Pyroviathan burn damage.

title: All in Hole: Black Hole Games
notes:
NEW PACKS WITH FRESH LEVELS!

Jul 06 - WEEKEND ROAD TRIP Pack: Pack your bags, fuel up the car, and explore 100 adventurous levels!
Jul 20 - TATAMI ROOM Pack: Embrace timeless rituals, discover hidden beauty, and explore 100 harmonious levels!
Aug 03 - MIDNIGHT MASQUERADE Pack: Don an elegant mask, glide down moonlit canals, and explore 100 romantic levels!

And don't miss the new TREASURE PASS season kicking off July 1!

Update regularly so you never miss fresh levels, events & surprises!

title: DIGIMON UP

title: Coin Master
notes:
Thanks for playing Coin Master!

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards! 

Enjoy a world of fun, thrills, and huge rewards right at your fingertips. 

Invite your friends to play Coin Master & get your FREE REWARDS! We also recommend joining our community on Facebook, X, and Instagram for more fun & excitement.

Enjoying Coin Master? Leave a review :)

title: West Game II
notes:
* Fortress Feud now lets you send two queues into battle!
* New Sn tags make spotting hero generations a breeze!
* 7 NEW flags added — represent your country in style!
* Borders locked down — no more sneaking into rival Alliance territory.
* UI improvements and bug fixes.

title: Merge Cooking®
notes:
Welcome back, Chef!
A new version of Merge Cooking is available!
To provide a better experience, we're working hard to optimize the game performance as well as bring you exciting content.
We hope you can enjoy the time playing!
New to the game? Don't worry. We've prepared step-by-step instructions to guide you through. Join us and have some fun.
